issues: Fresh-interpreter `import moe_surgeon.models.registry` fails with `ImportError: cannot import name 'BackendRegistry' from partially initialized module` because [src/moe_surgeon/models/registry.py](/home/netsky/dev/labs/moe-surgeon/src/moe_surgeon/models/registry.py:9) imports `backend.py` while [src/moe_surgeon/models/backend.py](/home/netsky/dev/labs/moe-surgeon/src/moe_surgeon/models/backend.py:151) re-imports `BackendRegistry`. This breaks the public registry module and misses the PM's import-light acceptance check; remove the circular re-export or move it to a non-cyclic location.

Regression coverage missed the broken import path. [tests/test_models_registry.py](/home/netsky/dev/labs/moe-surgeon/tests/test_models_registry.py:8) only imports `BackendRegistry` via `moe_surgeon.models.backend`, and there is no fresh-process test for `import moe_surgeon.models.registry` or for import-light behavior of both new modules.
